text: Wey Gu profile: Build things, troubleshoot and sing. Co-Founder @NowledgeLabs; builds @NowledgeMem and nowled.ge/kl. Microsoft MVP; previous NebulaGraph and Ericsson Cloud. Tech category; siwei.io/en; 2万 posts; 3,826 following; 1.7万 followers; 1 subscription service.

Pinned Nowledge Mem launch: a context/memory manager connecting dots among all agents in a daily workflow. It enables retrieval, sinking, and distilling over insights, conclusions, and findings. It persists and computes everything locally by default.

Wey released a new version of con before boarding. The update supports restoring terminal history, path, and layout, plus text dot-file layouts and directory-defined layouts. Link card: con.nowledge.co, con: terminal emulator with AI harness.

Wey says he was pushing an important con feature with speed xhigh before a flight, then the delay gave him time to cancel speed and run more review rounds. This is a process signal around fast implementation plus extra review for important terminal features.

Wey says con has been iterating rapidly from user suggestions and feedback, with many versions shipped. It is very usable on macOS, improving on Windows, and still evolving. He invites users to install, update regularly, and send improvement points. The quoted post links github.com/nowledge-co/co.
Wey reacts to a user noticing late-night con releases. Preserved as community feedback and shipping-cadence context.
